title: AI Startup Strategic Repositioning
description: Strategic Consulting Mission for an early-stage AI startup specializing in automated image processing.
problem: Operated in a highly competitive AI infrastructure market without clear differentiation or vertical focus.
actions: Conducted structured market and competitive analysis using SWOT and Porter's 5 Forces
Assessed demand potential across 5 high-value verticals
Developed a disruptive repositioning strategy focusing on Vertical AI specialization
Designed a phased 6-month go-to-market and implementation roadmap
result: Reframed positioning toward a specialized industry application (Vertical AI). Strategy acknowledged by CEO as a viable growth direction for Series A funding.

title: Digify Active: B2B Growth Agency
description: Building a performance marketing agency concept for SME fitness businesses in Europe.
problem: SME fitness businesses lacked structured digital marketing and data measurement systems.
actions: Conducted primary market research and defined ICP (Ideal Customer Profile)
Designed conversion-focused landing pages in HubSpot with A/B test setups
Launched and optimized Google Ads campaigns focused on lead generation
Analyzed key performance metrics: CTR, CPC, CTR, and lead conversion rates
result: Identified top-performing channels with a 15% lower projected CPA compared to benchmarks. Formulated data-backed optimization recommendations.

title: Oblicuo Hi-Fi Bar: Growth Strategy
description: Data-informed social media and positioning strategy for a niche hi-fi listening bar in Barcelona.
problem: Inconsistent weekday attendance (Tuesday–Thursday) and limited structured digital strategy for niche audiences.
actions: Conducted qualitative research through 16 deep customer interviews
Developed 3 segmented customer personas with specific triggers and barriers
Built a structured KPI framework for social media growth and event tracking
result: Established a clearly defined target segment and delivered a 6-month strategic plan grounded in real customer insights.
